description: Report whether a figure of WIDTH_IN x HEIGHT_IN inches complies with a journal's single/double column width (5 mm tolerance) and max height via check_figure_size().
rules: read-only: produces a compliance report only, no figure files
WIDTH_IN and HEIGHT_IN are figure dimensions in inches; the core converts to mm
JOURNAL one of nature|science|cell|plos|acs; unknown journals fall back to nature specs
degrades gracefully (writes a non-empty report, exits 0) when matplotlib is absent
usage: Set WIDTH_IN and HEIGHT_IN (inches). Optional JOURNAL (default nature). Output: size_check.json with width_mm/height_mm/column_type/compliant.
limitation: Only checks dimensions against the built-in spec table; does not inspect DPI, fonts, or colors.
